result.stdout:
Usage:
  cryptex encrypt <inputFile> <outputFile> [--passphrase <pass>]
  cryptex decrypt <inputFile> <outputFile> [--passphrase <pass>]
  cryptex encrypt-folder <folderPath> [--passphrase <pass>]
  cryptex decrypt-folder <folderPath> [--passphrase <pass>]

Options:
  --passphrase, -p   Specify passphrase (use with caution)

Environment Variables:
  CRYPTEX_PASSPHRASE Set passphrase via environment variable

commands.payload:
Usage:
  cryptex encrypt <inputFile> <outputFile> [--passphrase <pass>]
  cryptex decrypt <inputFile> <outputFile> [--passphrase <pass>]
  cryptex encrypt-folder <folderPath> [--passphrase <pass>]
  cryptex decrypt-folder <folderPath> [--passphrase <pass>]

Options:

Environment Variables:
  CRYPTEX_PASSPHRASE Set passphrase via environment variable
